offer: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We provide automated lease abstraction instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of lease terms and deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of lease terms and notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
